title: eureiandra fasciculata
intro: Eureiandra fasciculata, also known as the coral tree or coral shrub, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Eureiandra fasciculata include the treatment of various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive issues and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Eureiandra fasciculata can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
